    Method
    Description
    McpCaptureReplayResult
    CaptureService.codeBlocks(String sessionPath, String outputDirectory, String packageName, String className, boolean overwrite, String driverVariableName)
    Generates deterministic copy-paste code blocks from a persisted Capture session without replaying.
    McpCaptureReplayResult
    CaptureService.generateReplay(String sessionPath, String outputDirectory, String packageName, String className, boolean overwrite, boolean replay, boolean useAi, boolean allowLocalAi, boolean allowRemoteAi, String driverVariableName)
    Generates, compiles, and optionally replays a deterministic SHAFT TestNG test from a Capture session.
